# fleetdm_abm_tokens (Data Source)

Retrieves all Apple Business Manager (ABM) tokens from FleetDM. This is a Premium feature.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `tokens` (Attributes List) List of ABM tokens. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tokens))

<a id="nestedatt--tokens"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tokens`

Read-Only:

- `apple_id` (String) The Apple ID associated with the token.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the ABM token.
- `ios_team_id` (Number) The team ID for iOS devices enrolled via this token.
- `ios_team_name` (String) The team name for iOS devices.
- `ipados_team_id` (Number) The team ID for iPadOS devices enrolled via this token.
- `ipados_team_name` (String) The team name for iPadOS devices.
- `macos_team_id` (Number) The team ID for macOS devices enrolled via this token.
- `macos_team_name` (String) The team name for macOS devices.
- `mdm_server_url` (String) The MDM server URL.
- `organization_name` (String) The organization name in Apple Business Manager.
- `renew_date` (String) When the token needs to be renewed.
- `terms_expired` (Boolean) Whether the ABM terms and conditions have expired.
